_publications._publicationTitle: Selective nitration of Hsp90 acts as a metabolic switch promoting tumor cell proliferation.

_contextSnippet: a ~10 % decrease in cell growth was observed in normal Schwann cells after 48 h incubation in the presence of the inhibitor...abrogated the proliferative effect
resourceName: Normal human Schwann cells (Cat. No. 1700, ScienCell Research Laboratories)
details: P2X7R inhibitor KN62 (10 μM) caused ~10% decrease in cell growth after 48h incubation and abrogated proliferative effects of nitrated Hsp90
